subcodes.first_line: We have sent forth the Badi' through Our grace, and with Him a noble Book, and We intended naught thereby save the drawing nigh of the servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارسلنا البدیع بفضل من عندنا و معه کتاب کریم و ماقصدنا منه الا تقرب العباد
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @justice and wrath of God, @martyrs and martyrdom
